sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Pacific Biosciences (PACB) Garnering Attention Amid Involvement in Trillion Gene Atlas Program
feed.summary: Pacific Biosciences (NASDAQ: PACB) is gaining attention due to its involvement in the Trillion Gene Atlas program, where its Revio platform will be used by Basecamp Research to generate a large metagenomics database. Despite this advancement, Barclays recently downgraded PACB's price target and rating, citing expectations of a difficult market and a potential temporary drop in consumable sales due to competitive launches and client anticipation of a new platform. The company specializes in designing sequencing systems to solve genetically complex problems for various institutions globally.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson Earnings: Firm Sees New Launches, Long-Term Guidance Looks Optimistic
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson reported strong first-quarter sales growth and raised its 2026 guidance midpoints for both sales and adjusted EPS. Morningstar has increased its fair value estimate for J&J stock to $190 per share, citing confidence in new product launches like Inlexzo and Icotyde, as well as share gains for Tremfya. Despite the optimistic long-term outlook, Morningstar believes the shares remain overvalued due to strong competition and future patent exposures.

feed.title: [144] DELTA AIR LINES, INC. SEC Filing
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) has filed a Form 144 notice for the proposed sale of 15,000 shares of Common Stock, related to restricted stock vesting. The filing also indicates that John E. Laughter previously sold 69,304 shares for over $4.7 million on April 10, 2026. Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC is listed as the broker for the proposed sale.

feed.title: ULTA Maintains Buy Rating by DA Davidson -- Price Target Stays at $650
feed.summary: DA Davidson has maintained a 'Buy' rating for Ulta Beauty (ULTA) with an unchanged price target of $650.00, reflecting strong confidence in the company's performance. GuruFocus indicates that ULTA is currently undervalued by 2.8% and has a high GF Score™ of 97/100, suggesting strong potential for long-term returns despite recent insider selling. The company exhibits exceptional profitability and solid growth metrics, outweighing some concerns about its historical P/E and financial strength.

feed.title: How a Quality Screen Helped This International Equities ETF Beat the Average
feed.summary: The American Century Quality Diversified International ETF (QINT) has outperformed its peers due to its quality screening process, which identifies midcap global stocks outside the U.S. with strong financials and growth potential. This strategy has allowed QINT to deliver strong returns amidst global volatility and provides diversification as tech stock concentration risks and energy costs pose challenges. The ETF's performance suggests it could be an appealing option for investors seeking to outperform in the coming months.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies' (TYL) "Buy" Rating Reaffirmed at DA Davidson
feed.summary: DA Davidson has reaffirmed a "Buy" rating for Tyler Technologies (TYL) with a $460 target price, indicating a potential 42.9% upside. This comes despite Tyler Technologies missing its recent quarterly earnings and revenue estimates. Analysts generally maintain a positive outlook on the stock, with an average target price of $463.69, although some firms have recently lowered their targets.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp stock (US3167731005): Why does its Midwest focus matter more now for U.S. invest
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp's regional focus in the Midwest and Southeast positions it for resilience amidst economic uncertainties, offering a diversified business model centered on commercial banking, consumer lending, and wealth management. The bank's emphasis on low-cost deposits, core banking relationships, and digital investments provides predictable cash flows and lower volatility for investors. Despite risks like interest rate sensitivity and potential regulatory changes, its strategic priorities and strong capital position make it relevant for investors seeking exposure to U.S. regional economic health.

feed.title: Why NextEra Energy Is a Safe Way to Invest in the Solar Energy Boom
feed.summary: NextEra Energy (NYSE: NEE) offers a relatively safe avenue to invest in the U.S. solar energy boom, which is rapidly expanding and projected to surpass coal in total installed capacity. The company's unique structure, combining a stable regulated utility (Florida Power & Light) with a large-scale renewable energy development platform (NextEra Energy Resources), provides both predictable cash flow and exposure to high growth in solar, wind, and battery storage. This dual approach minimizes the cyclical risks typically associated with solar pure-play companies, making it an attractive option for investors seeking a balance of growth and stability.

feed.title: Microchip Technology Inc. Expands dsPIC33A DSCs Family for High-Density AI Data Center Power, Complex Motor Control and Intelligent Sensing
feed.summary: Microchip Technology Inc. has expanded its dsPIC33A DSC family with the introduction of dsPIC33AK256MPS306 Digital Signal Controllers. These new devices offer high-resolution control, high-speed analog, and security features including support for post-quantum cryptography, targeting high-density AI data center power, complex motor control, and intelligent sensing applications. They are designed to reduce BOM, simplify board layout, and accelerate time to market, incorporating advanced communication interfaces, motor feedback support, and functional safety processes for critical applications.

feed.title: A Look At Costco Wholesale (COST) Valuation After Recent Share Price Cooling
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale (COST) has experienced a recent cooling in its share price, with a 2.73% decline over the last month, though its five-year performance remains strong. Trading at US$980.85, the stock is considered 35% overvalued compared to an intrinsic value estimate of $726.29, primarily due to high valuation multiple risk despite strong operational growth. Investors are encouraged to review the company's financial data to determine their own stance on its future prospects and valuation.

feed.title: Is Verizon Communications (VZ) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Pullback?
feed.summary: Verizon Communications (VZ) has experienced a recent stock price pullback but is assessed as undervalued based on two valuation approaches: a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis, which suggests a 62% discount to its intrinsic value, and its Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio compared to Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio. The article also presents "Bull" and "Bear" case narratives for Verizon, with fair values ranging from US$40.00 to US$51.17, helping investors consider different future scenarios. Despite recent declines, the stock shows positive year-to-date and annual returns.

feed.title: Moody’s Warning Puts Blue Owl Liquidity And Dividend Sustainability In Focus
feed.summary: Moody’s has revised its outlook on Blue Owl Credit Income Corp. to negative due to high investor redemption requests, raising concerns about liquidity and dividend sustainability for Blue Owl Capital (NYSE:OWL). This news compounds previous investor confidence issues, with the stock down significantly year-to-date and over the past year. Investors are now focused on how Blue Owl addresses these liquidity pressures, responds to a pending lawsuit, and manages its 10.65% dividend, which is flagged as potentially unsustainable.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) EVP has 12,993 shares withheld for RSU tax
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares senior executive Brantley J. Standridge reported a tax-related share disposition where 12,993 shares of common stock were withheld to cover his tax obligation from a restricted stock unit (RSU) award vesting. The shares were valued at $16.38 each. Following this non-market transaction, Standridge directly holds 445,329.847 shares of Huntington Bancshares common stock.

feed.title: Ecolab Inc stock (US2788651006): Why sustainability leadership matters more now for investors
feed.summary: The article analyzes Ecolab Inc. (ECL) stock, highlighting its strong position in water, hygiene, and infection prevention solutions, which aligns with growing global sustainability demands. It emphasizes Ecolab's defensive growth profile, recurring revenue, and long-standing dividend history as compelling factors for investors. The piece also discusses the company's strategic focus on innovation, environmental goals, and its resilience against various market risks.

feed.title: Mosaic Company stock (US61945C1036): Why does its fertilizer dominance matter more now for U.S. inve
feed.summary: Mosaic Company is positioned as a leading global producer of phosphate and potash, essential crop nutrients. Amid rising global food demand and agricultural challenges, Mosaic's vertically integrated business model and strategic market position offer significant potential for U.S. investors seeking exposure to the agriculture sector. The company's focus on asset optimization, market expansion, and sustainability, along with its strong presence in key farming regions, underpins its relevance in volatile markets.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet Shareholder Vote Puts Board Leadership And Valuation In Focus
feed.summary: A shareholder proposal at Zimmer Biomet Holdings (NYSE:ZBH) calls for separating the roles of Board Chairman and CEO, a move the current board advises against. This vote highlights governance and accountability concerns amidst mixed stock performance, with the stock seeing a 4.8% gain over the past week and 5.9% year to date, but a 40.6% decline over five years. The outcome of the vote could significantly influence investor perception of the company's oversight, risk management, and succession planning.

feed.title: First Order snags Domino’s in Jamaica
feed.summary: Brothers Sean and Nicholas Scott, through their company First Order Brands Limited, have acquired the master franchise for Domino's Pizza in Jamaica from Convenient Brands Ltd. This acquisition makes them the new owners of the island's largest pizza restaurant chain, which currently operates 18 stores and employs over 200 people. Sean Scott will serve as CEO, leveraging his previous experience managing Domino's and Wendy's franchises in Jamaica, while Nicholas Scott will chair the company.

feed.title: JustStorage Reports 11.6% Revenue Growth in 2025, Outpacing Much of the Public Self-Storage Sector
feed.summary: JustStorage announced an 11.6% growth in occupied revenue for 2025, significantly outperforming competitors in the public self-storage sector. This success is attributed to its owner-first management model, a technology-driven execution, and a growing leadership team focused on transparent reporting and responsive service. The company aims to attract third-party owners by emphasizing its innovative technology stack and commitment to strong revenue growth.

feed.title: ROSEN, A HIGHLY RECOGNIZED LAW FIRM, Encourages Gartner, Inc. Investors to Secure Counsel Before Important Deadline in Securities Class Action – IT
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is encouraging investors of Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) who purchased common stock between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, to secure legal counsel before the May 18, 2026, lead plaintiff deadline for a securities class action. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner made false or misleading statements regarding its growth rates and its ability to meet consulting revenue targets or maintain its contract value growth rate. Investors are advised to contact the firm if they suffered damages.

feed.title: Assurant Inc. stock (US04621X1081): Why does its protection niche matter more for U.S. investors now
feed.summary: Assurant Inc. (US04621X1081) offers a stable investment opportunity by specializing in device and home protection services, turning everyday consumer risks into predictable revenue streams. Its business model, focused on recurring premiums from partnerships with retailers and carriers, provides consistent profitability and stability, unlike traditional insurers exposed to catastrophic events. For U.S. investors, Assurant presents a defensive exposure to consumer essentials, offering dividend reliability and growth potential from technology adoption trends and international expansion.

feed.title: PEGA Maintained by Citigroup -- Price Target Lowered to $70
feed.summary: Citigroup analyst Steven Enders maintained a 'Buy' rating for Pegasystems (PEGA) but lowered the price target from $75.00 to $70.00. Despite a 7.1% overvaluation according to the GF Value™, Pegasystems holds a strong GF Score™ of 85/100, driven by a 9/10 Financial Strength rating. Investors are advised to be cautious due to the current overvaluation and recent significant insider selling.

feed.title: PGA Tour event at Quail Hollow gets makeover with Truist as title sponsor (PHOTOS)
feed.summary: The PGA Tour event at Quail Hollow, now sponsored by Truist, will be known as the Truist Championship and features significant enhancements. The event, held in Charlotte, includes expanded corporate hospitality areas and new fan seating. This marks the first Truist Championship to be hosted in the city.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser Co. stock (US9621661043): Why timberland strategy matters more now for U.S. investors?
feed.summary: This report analyzes Weyerhaeuser Co.'s timberland strategy, highlighting its role as a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on owning and managing timberlands across the U.S. Amid persistent housing demand and supply constraints, its vast timberland portfolio positions it for steady gains, offering a natural hedge against inflation and generating cash flows from timber sales. The article also discusses market drivers, competitive advantages, risks, and why it's an important investment for U.S. and global investors.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) Shareholders
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP reminds investors of PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) of an upcoming April 20, 2026 deadline to file a lead plaintiff motion in a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit stems from alleged securities fraud after PayPal announced a leadership change and admitted to underperforming expectations, causing its stock price to fall significantly. Investors who purchased PayPal stock between February 8, 2024, and February 2, 2026, and suffered losses are urged to contact the firm.

feed.title: Linde plc stock (IE00BZ12WP82): Why does its industrial gases dominance matter more now for U.S. investors?
feed.summary: Linde plc, the world's largest industrial gases company, is increasingly relevant for U.S. investors due to its dominance in essential markets powering semiconductors, healthcare, and clean energy. Its stable business model, characterized by long-term contracts and high barriers to entry, provides reliable returns and positions the company to benefit from electrification and clean tech trends. Linde's strong North American presence, dividend growth, and leadership in the hydrogen economy make it an attractive defensive yet growth-oriented investment for quality-focused portfolios.

feed.title: FCX Maintained by Scotiabank -- Price Target Lowered to $71.00
feed.summary: Scotiabank has maintained its Sector Outperform rating for Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) but lowered the price target slightly to $71.00 from $72.00. Despite the positive outlook from analysts, GuruFocus indicates that FCX is currently overvalued by 46.6% based on its GF Value™ of $46.78 against a current price of $68.58, with significant insider selling also noted. The company's GF Score™ is 87/100, driven by strong growth and profitability, but hampered by a low valuation score.

feed.title: Fund Update: New $55.1M $SLB stock position opened by Hamlin Capital Management, LLC
feed.summary: Hamlin Capital Management, LLC has opened a new $55.1 million position in SLB stock, as disclosed in a recent SEC 13F filing for the report period ending March 31, 2026. The article details recent hedge fund activity, insider trading, government contracts awarded to SLB, congressional stock trading involving SLB, and current analyst ratings and price targets for the company.

feed.title: Cintas approves $0.45 quarterly dividend, payable June 15
feed.summary: Cintas Corporation has announced its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.45 per share, payable on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. The company boasts a 42-year history of annual dividend increases since its initial public offering in 1983. This news comes amidst other strategic developments, including a new $2 billion revolving credit facility and analysts maintaining positive ratings on Cintas due to strong demand and potential acquisition synergies.

feed.title: US looks to ensure long-term supply of RTX drone interceptors
feed.summary: The U.S. government is working to secure a long-term supply of Coyote drone interceptors manufactured by RTX. This effort is aimed at modernizing air defenses and comes as the U.S. has committed to sending thousands of these interceptors to Ukraine. The expansion of production capacity will be overseen by the U.S. Army.

feed.title: Preformed Line Products stock (US74044L1089): Why utility infrastructure demand matters more now
feed.summary: Preformed Line Products (US74044L1089) is positioned as a key player in the utility infrastructure sector, specializing in hardware for power and telecom lines. The company benefits from surging demand for grid modernization, renewable energy integration, and broadband expansion, driven by federal funding and global trends. Its specialized, proprietary products and strong market position make it an attractive investment for those seeking defensive growth tied to long-term infrastructure spending.

feed.title: Bank of America sends stark warning on global investor sentiment
feed.summary: A Bank of America survey reveals global investor sentiment is the most bearish since June 2025, with inflation expectations at a five-year high, largely due to rising oil prices from the U.S.-Iran conflict. Despite this, 70% of participants believe a recession is unlikely, expecting a "soft landing" for the global economy. This bearish sentiment extends to the crypto market, with the Crypto Fear & Greed Index showing prolonged "Fear" and "Extreme Fear" over the past year.

feed.title: Praxis Precision Medicines Inc (PRAX) Stock Price, Quote, News & History
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive overview of Praxis Precision Medicines Inc (PRAX) stock, including its current price ($340.80), key statistics, recent news, and financial data. The company is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm focused on central nervous system disorders, with recent news highlighting the FDA's acceptance of an NDA for ulixacaltamide and positive trial results for Elsunersen. The article also includes analyst ratings, valuation metrics, and frequently asked questions for investors.

feed.title: PFSI Investor News: If You Have Suffered Losses in PennyMac Financial Services, Inc. (NYSE: ...
feed.summary: Rosen Law Firm is investigating potential securities claims against PennyMac Financial Services, Inc. (NYSE: PFSI) following allegations of misleading business information. The investigation comes after PennyMac reported significantly reduced pre-tax income in its servicing segment and a 60% drop in pre-tax income excluding valuation-related items, leading to a substantial stock price drop. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to contact the Rosen Law Firm for potential class action recovery.

feed.title: Petrobras (NYSE: PBR) CCO reports spouse-held PETR4 share trades
feed.summary: Petrobras Chief Commercial Officer Laureano Angelica Garcia Cobas reported mixed insider trades of PETR4 shares held indirectly by a spouse. The transactions involved an open-market purchase of 1,000 PETR4 shares and an open-market sale of 19 PETR4 shares, with prices converted from BRL to USD. Following these trades and a correction for previously overreported shares, the spouse’s indirect holdings attributed to Cobas now total 3,659 PETR4 shares.

feed.title: QUALCOMM Incorporated stock (US7475251036): Is AI chip demand strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: QUALCOMM Inc. is positioned for growth due to its role in mobile and edge AI, with its dual business model of semiconductor sales (QCT) and licensing (QTL) providing stable revenue. The company is diversifying beyond smartphones into automotive and PC markets with its Snapdragon platforms and faces geopolitical risks and intense competition, but analysts generally hold a positive view on its stock due to strong demand for their chips and strategic importance in the 5G and AI landscape.

feed.title: The Coca-Cola Co. Names New Global Chief People Officer
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Co. has appointed Tapaswee Chandele as its new global chief people officer, effective May 1, 2026. She will succeed Lisa Chang, who is stepping down after seven years but will remain with the company as a senior adviser through the end of 2026. Chandele previously served as senior vice president and executive assistant to the president and CFO, and has been with Coca-Cola since 2001.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. (NUAI)
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP reminds investors of a June 1, 2026 deadline to file a lead plaintiff motion in a class action lawsuit against New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. (NUAI). The lawsuit alleges the company made materially false and misleading statements about its permitting progress and was involved in a fraudulent scheme to siphon revenue from oil and gas wells while avoiding environmental cleanup. This follows reports from Fuzzy Panda Research and Hunterbrook Media detailing alleged financial misconduct and a lawsuit filed by the New Mexico Attorney General.

feed.title: Fortinet Inc stock (US34959J1088): Is cybersecurity demand strong enough to drive sustained growth?
feed.summary: Fortinet Inc. is positioned to capitalize on growing cybersecurity demand with its integrated Security Fabric platform, addressing rising threats like ransomware and AI-driven attacks. While the company's approach offers scalability and recurring revenue through software subscriptions and ASIC-powered firewalls, its sustained growth hinges on execution amidst intense competition from rivals like Palo Alto Networks and CrowdStrike. Investors should monitor quarterly billings, subscription growth, and competitive wins to assess its long-term resilience in a volatile market.

feed.title: Watch CNBC's full interview with Oppenheimer's Ari Wald and State Street's Michael Arone
feed.summary: Oppenheimer's Ari Wald and State Street's Michael Arone were featured in a full interview on CNBC's 'Power Lunch'. They discussed current news impacting the markets. The article also includes links to other recent CNBC interviews.

feed.title: EG Maintained by B of A Securities -- Price Target Raised to $45
feed.summary: B of A Securities has maintained a 'Buy' rating for Everest Group (EG) and raised its price target to $454, up from $430. GuruFocus indicates that EG is currently undervalued by 17.7% with a GF Value™ of $412.92, trading at $339.97. The company's strong profitability and valuation metrics contribute to its GF Score™ of 72/100, despite low momentum.

feed.title: Dexcom Inc. stock (US2521311074): Is continuous glucose monitoring strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: Dexcom Inc. is a leading company in continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) technology, which is transforming diabetes care globally. The article highlights Dexcom's core business model, its strong market position driven by the expanding diabetes market, and its competitive edge against rivals like Abbott and Medtronic. It emphasizes the company's appeal to investors, particularly in English-speaking markets, due to its growth potential, recurring revenue, and alignment with healthcare trends.

feed.title: Martin Marietta Materials stock (US5732841060): Why infrastructure demand matters more now for stead
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials is positioned for reliable growth due to increasing U.S. infrastructure spending, leveraging its leadership in construction aggregates like crushed stone, sand, and gravel. The company's strategic acquisitions and efficient operations in regions like the Southeast and Midwest enable it to capture local pricing power and generate predictable cash flows. Despite industry cyclicality and potential risks from weather, fuel costs, and regulatory scrutiny, analysts view Martin Marietta as a strong industrial pick with stable growth prospects due to its defensive qualities and alignment with federal spending priorities.

feed.title: Comcast Settles Data Breach Lawsuit for 117 Million Dollars
feed.summary: Comcast Corp. has reached a $117.5 million class-action settlement stemming from a 2023 data breach that affected 31.6 million to 35 million current and former Xfinity customers. Eligible class members can now file claims for documented out-of-pocket losses up to $10,000, compensation for lost time, or a pro rata cash payment. Additionally, all class members will receive three years of identity defense services through CyEx Financial Shield Complete.

feed.title: Petsense by Tractor Supply to Host Nationwide Spring Adoptathon, Connecting Thousands of Pets With New Families
feed.summary: Petsense by Tractor Supply will host its nationwide Spring Adoptathon on Saturday, April 18, from 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. local time, aiming to facilitate 1,200 adoptions. This event, in partnership with Seresto and Hill’s Science Diet, will bring local shelters into Petsense stores to connect adoptable pets with new families. Adopters will receive exclusive new pet parent offers, expert guidance, and Neighbor's Club rewards to support them beyond adoption day.

feed.title: BOSS Zhipin Continues Share Repurchases, with Total Repurchases Amounting to Over RMB835 Million in 2026
feed.summary: BOSS Zhipin (Nasdaq: BZ; HK: 2076) announced the continued execution of its share repurchase program, buying back 608,328 ordinary shares for over RMB27.2 million on April 13, 2026. This brings the total share repurchases for 2026 to over RMB835 million, demonstrating the company's commitment to enhancing shareholder returns.

feed.title: Axon Enterprise Inc. stock (US05464C1018): Is public safety tech demand strong enough to drive susta
feed.summary: Axon Enterprise Inc. is a leading public safety technology provider, known for its body cameras, TASER devices, and cloud-based evidence management software. The company is actively transitioning from a hardware-centric model to one with recurring software revenue, driven by its Axon Evidence cloud platform. This shift, combined with expansion into drones and AI-powered tools, positions Axon as a key player in a growing sector supported by increasing public safety tech budgets and demand for accountability in law enforcement globally.

feed.title: Kroger’s grocery market share in Cincinnati dips slightly but it still dominates
feed.summary: Kroger Co.'s grocery market share in Greater Cincinnati has slightly dipped to 49.5%, but the company still maintains its dominant position in the region. The article notes that while its share has shifted, Kroger remains the leading player in the local grocery market.

feed.title: [8-K] Otter Tail Corp Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Otter Tail Corporation (OTTR) has reported executive leadership changes as part of its long-term succession plan. Tim Rogelstad was appointed President of Otter Tail Corporation, while Todd Wahlund became Senior Vice President and President of Otter Tail Power Company, and Tyler Nelson was elected Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. The company also detailed compensation packages for the new roles and a retention award for Senior Vice President and General Counsel Jennifer Smestad.

feed.title: Otter Tail Corp (OTTR) director receives 1,500-share stock grant
feed.summary: Otter Tail Corp director Mary E. Ludford received an equity award of 1,500 restricted shares on April 13, 2026, under the 2023 Stock Incentive Plan. These shares, valued at a fair market value of $91.15 each, will vest in near-equal installments over three years, starting April 8, 2027. Following this grant, Ludford's total direct holdings in Otter Tail Corp amount to 7,071 shares.

feed.title: Survey of 7,982 investors puts Ameriprise 3rd in advised segment
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE: AMP) achieved a high investor satisfaction score, ranking third in the advised investors segment of the J.D. Power 2026 U.S. Investor Satisfaction Study℠. This recognition reflects Ameriprise's 132-year history of helping clients reach financial goals and the quality of advice and solutions provided by its advisors. The study surveyed 7,982 advised investors across various dimensions of their wealth management experience.
